stories.title: Knicks Sweep Cavaliers 130-93 — First NBA Finals Since 1999
stories.angle: Twenty-seven years of waiting ended with a blowout. The Knicks are going to the Finals and they look unstoppable.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
NEW YORK IS GOING TO THE NBA FINALS.

Knicks 130, Cavs 93. A 37-point blowout. KAT: 19/14. Brunson: 15. Shamet: 16 off the bench.

The drought is over. 27 years. First Finals since 1999.

#HoopHeroes #Knicks #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Knicks are going to the NBA Finals.

They swept the Cavs. Mitchell had 31 and it didn't matter. New York led by 45.

11 straight playoff wins. No team has slowed this team down.

#HoopHeroes #Knicks #NBAPlayoffs

research.facts:
Knicks 130-93 Cavaliers — ECF Game 4 Sweep
**Sources:**
- NBA.com Game Recap (primary): Knicks 130, Cavaliers 93; KAT 19 pts/14 reb; Brunson 15; Bridges 15; Shamet 16 off bench; Knicks led by 45, up 68-49 at half; Mitchell 31 for Cavs; Cavs swept for first time since 2018 Finals vs GS
- Olympics.com / Yahoo Sports: Knicks first Finals since 1999; four-game sweep of ECF; 11-game win streak; 32-5 second-chance points; 33-9 fast-break points advantage
- CBS Sports bracket/schedule: Game 1 June 3 at OKC or SA, 8:30 PM ET
**Confidence:**
- [HIGH] Final score: Knicks 130, Cavaliers 93 (multiple sources)
- [HIGH] KAT 19 pts/14 reb; Brunson 15 pts; Bridges 15 pts; Shamet 16 off bench (NBA.com recap)
- [HIGH] Knicks led by 45 points max; up 68-49 at half (multiple sources confirm "19-point halftime lead")
- [HIGH] Mitchell 31 for Cleveland (multiple sources)
- [HIGH] Knicks advancing to NBA Finals for first time since 1999 (all sources)
- [HIGH] Cavs swept for first time since 2018 Finals vs Golden State (multiple sources)
- [HIGH] Knicks 11-game win streak (multiple sources)
- [HIGH] Game 1 Finals: June 3 at OKC/SA, 8:30 PM ET (CBS Sports/SI)

stories.title: WCF Game 5 TONIGHT — Thunder vs Spurs at Paycom Center OKC
stories.angle: Home-court advantage, a hobbled Thunder and a rampaging Wembanyama make this one of the most compelling Game 5s in recent WCF memory.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
TONIGHT: Thunder vs. Spurs — WCF Game 5.

Paycom Center, OKC | 8:30 PM ET | NBC/Peacock
Series tied 2-2. Jalen Williams questionable.

Winner faces the Knicks in the NBA Finals.

#HoopHeroes #ThunderUp #PorVida #NBAPlayoffs

stories.title: Jalen Brunson Named 2026 ECF MVP
stories.angle: The first Knick since Ewing. The man who carried New York back to the biggest stage.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Jalen Brunson: 2026 ECF MVP.

25.5 PPG | 7.8 APG | 48.7% FG

Led a 22-pt comeback in G1. Career-high 14 assists in G2. 30 pts in G3.

First Knick to win this award since Patrick Ewing in 1999.

#HoopHeroes #Knicks

stories.title: NBA Finals 2026 — Full Schedule and Matchup Preview
stories.angle: MSG hosts its first Finals games since 1999. New York gets the Finals without home court — just like the last time.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The 2026 NBA Finals schedule is set:

Game 1: June 3 at OKC/SA — 8:30 PM ET
Game 3: June 8 at MSG
Game 4: June 10 at MSG

Knicks vs. Thunder or Spurs. No home-court for New York.

It starts June 3. #HoopHeroes #NBAFinals #Knicks

stories.title: Knicks' 11-Game Win Streak — One of the All-Time Postseason Runs
stories.angle: This isn't just a hot team — it's a historically elite postseason run that deserves recognition beyond a simple bracket update.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The 2026 Knicks have won 11 straight playoff games.

Only 4 teams in NBA history have done that in one postseason.

130.5 offensive rating. 32-5 in second-chance pts Monday. This run is elite.

#HoopHeroes #Knicks #NBAPlayoffs
